column1: # source: BLS American Time Use Survey (ATUS) 2023-2024 summary tables
column2: bls.gov/tus/ (atus_06272024 and atus.pdf). Typical weekday averages; employed reflects full-time workers (less sleep ~7.8-8.0h
column5: non-employed reflect more sleep (~9h) and more leisure (~6-7.6h
column6: highest among 65+). Middle-aged (45-54) sleep least; older groups have most leisure and least work. Wake/sleep are clock hours.
